intro: Asthena therum forskaolii, also known as Forskohlii, is a plant species belonging to the family of lamiaceae and native to various parts of Asia and Eastern Africa, its root contains a key bioactive compound called forskolin. The health benefits of Forskohlii include potential weight loss, improved cardiovascular health, and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Forskohlii include forskolin, a labdane diterpenoid that has been shown to increase cyclic AMP levels in cells, leading to various physiological effects. Forskohlii is commonly used in herbal preparations such as capsules, tablets, and tinctures, often marketed for its potential benefits in weight management and overall health support.
